events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll create the required JSON file directly, keeping it scoped to the observed heat trace defect and NEC 427 grounding/protection expectations.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && printf '%s
' '{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 70,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.91,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Heat trace circuit is installed without the required GFPE breaker or equivalent ground-fault protection for equipment.\",
    \"Rough installation is not code-compliant and should not be energized until corrected and tested.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Install the specified GFPE breaker or listed ground-fault protective device suitable for the heat tracing system.\",
    \"Verify breaker rating, trip setting, circuit identification, and installation against engineered drawings and manufacturer requirements.\",
    \"Perform insulation resistance, continuity, grounding, and functional trip testing before inspection or energization.\",
    \"Document corrective work and request reinspection before closeout.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The heat trace system is roughed in but lacks GFPE protection. NEC 427 requires ground-fault protection for electric heat tracing and heating panels, so the installed condition is defective and non-compliant. Treat progress as approximately 70 percent complete until the protection device is installed, tested, documented, and inspected.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC 427 - Fixed Electric Heating Equipment for Pipelines and Vessels\",
    \"NEC 427 ground-fault protection requirements for heat tracing circuits\"
  ]
}' > /app/answer.json
cat /app/answer.json"
→ /app
